2d:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"IP Info"}],": 5 minutes (network requests are expensive)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"System Info"}],": 24 hours (rarely changes)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Process Info"}],": 5 seconds (changes frequently)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Disk/RAM"}],": 1 minute (moderate change frequency)"]}],"\n"]}]
